prompt_text:
### Demographics: 45-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 2 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Body mass index category: Normal
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~7.5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 52.7 kg; Height 167.5 cm; BMI 18.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 123/81 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.2%; 9 months ago 9.7%; 6 months ago 9.2%; 3 months ago 8.7%; current 8.6%), FPG (12 months ago 221mg/dL; 9 months ago 239mg/dL; 6 months ago 246mg/dL; 3 months ago 228mg/dL; current 223mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 57.1kg; 9 months ago 53.7kg; 6 months ago 50.3kg; 3 months ago 51.1kg; current 52.7kg), Height (12 months ago 167.5cm; 9 months ago 167.5cm; 6 months ago 167.5cm; 3 months ago 167.5cm; current 167.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 18.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 18.0kg/m²; current 18.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 128mmHg; 9 months ago 124mmHg; 6 months ago 128mmHg; 3 months ago 123mmHg; current 123mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 78mmHg; 9 months ago 82mmHg; 6 months ago 79mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 81mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 12U/L; 9 months ago 6U/L; 6 months ago 14U/L; 3 months ago 5.0U/L; current 10U/L), AST (12 months ago 20U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 20U/L; 3 months ago 25U/L; current 23U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 43mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 43mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 45mL/min/1.73m²; current 42mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 124mg/g; 9 months ago 100mg/g; 6 months ago 151mg/g; 3 months ago 159mg/g; current 139mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 89mg/dL; 9 months ago 89mg/dL; 6 months ago 87mg/dL; 3 months ago 90mg/dL; current 91mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 52mg/dL; 9 months ago 54mg/dL; 6 months ago 52mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 53mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 128mg/dL; 9 months ago 111mg/dL; 6 months ago 108mg/dL; 3 months ago 126mg/dL; current 117mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.9g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 11.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.71 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
